title: polystichum aculeatum var. mucronifolium
intro: Polystichum aculeatum var. mucronifolium, also known as the prickly polystichum or spiny shield fern, is a plant species within the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Polystichum aculeatum var. mucronifolium are said to include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections, as well as being used as a treatment for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat a range of health conditions.
